CHANGE RECORD 
When the quality of the products changes, the QuID  is updated and a row is added to this table.  The 
third column specifies which sections or sub -sections have been updated. The fourth column should 
mention the version of the product to which the change applies.

 Page 4/ 19 
I.EXECUTIVE SUMMARY 
I.1 Products covered by this document 
This document is the quality information document for the Copernicus Marine Environment Monitoring 
Service ( CMEMS) global analysis and forecast  wave product 
GLOBAL_ANALYSIS_FORECAST_WAV_001_027. This product provides aggregated analyses updated 
daily and 10-day forecasts, all defined on a standard grid at 1/10 degree (approx. 10km)  resolution.  A 
2-years rolling archive is stored on the CMEMS server.  The assimilation system is updated with SWIM -
nadir (Surface Waves Investigation and Monitoring instrument), Sentinel 6  and SWOT-nadir (Surface 
Water and Ocean Topography) Significant Wave Height (SWH) and wave spectra at beam 10°of CFOSAT 
mission (Chinese-French Oceanic SATellite). 
The product is organised as 1 dataset ( cmems_mod_glo_wav_anfc_0.083deg_PT3H-i) containing 3 -
hourly instantaneous values for the following variables: 
• Spectral significant wave height (Hm0) 
• Maximum crest-trough

catalog_entry.summary: This document is a quality information document for the Copernicus Marine Environment Monitoring Service's global analysis and forecast wave product, providing details on its production system, validation framework, results, and updates.
